Ntc Of Motion For Order To Permit Pretrial Discovery Of Defts Profits And Financial Condition
Off Calendar Dec-08-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling -
PLAINTIFF KENNETH BUKOWSKI'S Motion For Order To Permit Pretrial Discovery Of Defendants Profits And Financial Condition IS Denied. Plaintiff has not established that there is a substantial probability that plaintiff will prevail on his request for punitive damages. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported. = (302/HEK)
